changeSet.author: nico
changeSet.comment: RSDEV-1065 add DTYPE discriminator column to the Sample table

changeSet.author: nico
changeSet.comment: RSDEV-1065 add DTYPE discriminator column to the Sample_AUD table

changeSet.author: nico
changeSet.comment: RSDEV-1065 backfill Sample.DTYPE from the legacy template flag

changeSet.author: nico
changeSet.comment: RSDEV-1065 backfill Sample_AUD.DTYPE from the legacy template flag so Envers can resolve historical Sample/SampleTemplate revisions

changeSet.author: nico
changeSet.comment: RSDEV-1065 make Sample.DTYPE NOT NULL once backfilled (audit table stays nullable, matching Envers conventions)

changeSet.author: nico
changeSet.comment: RSDEV-1065 drop the legacy boolean template column now that DTYPE has fully replaced it. It was retained only as a vestigial backfill source for DTYPE and is no longer mapped by Hibernate or read anywhere, so it is now removed from the live and audit tables.
